route_families.title: Getting started
notes: Entry point for Unity SDK installation and initial console credential setup.
May include version-sensitive SDK download links.

route_families.title: SDK initialization
notes: Covers synchronous and asynchronous initialization patterns.
Important when an agent needs exact initialization behavior or settings fields.

route_families.title: User and authentication
notes: Includes custom, guest, federation, and token-based login flows.

route_families.title: Game information
notes: Shared gameplay data patterns and table operations.

route_families.title: Player data
notes: Per-player data operations, reads, writes, and transactions.

route_families.title: Rank and leaderboard
notes: Use rank as the stable public route family for now.
Leaderboard naming may appear elsewhere, but rank routes are the safer canonical reference.

route_families.title: Base-side function calls
notes: Client-side function listing and invocation from BACKND Base.

route_families.title: Error catalog
notes: Broad error index for status and error-code driven troubleshooting.

route_families.title: Notify and handlers
notes: Connection lifecycle and handler categories for realtime notifications.

route_families.title: Operation notices
notes: Operational notices surfaced from the platform.

route_families.title: Operation events
notes: Operational event listing and lookup routes.

route_families.title: BACKND Function product
notes: Separate product documentation for building and deploying backend functions.
Depends on BACKND Base and should not be treated as a standalone replacement for Base.
